name: Barley, Bell Pepper and Corn Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 Cups Fresh Corn, or frozen, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse and drain the barley.
2. Sprinkle the barley into a large saucepan of boiling salted water, stirring, and bring to boil. Skim the froth and continue boiling for 30 minutes, or until just tender. Drain the barley and rinse under cold water. Allow to cool.
3. Transfer the cooled barley to a large bowl. Add chopped bell pepper, corn, and parsley. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
4. In a separate bowl, whisk together white wine vinegar (plus 1 teaspoon), salt, and pepper to taste. Gradually add olive oil, whisking until the dressing is emulsified.
5. Toss the salad mixture with the dressing until well combined.
6. The salad can be prepared up to 8 hours in advance and kept covered and chilled. However, parsley should not be added until just before serving.
